brief_summary: Coral line chart plotting the Work Louder x OpenAI Codex Micro Trends Tracker row across three consecutive weeks: 58 (W27, week of the June 29 teaser), 68 (W28, one week later), and 94 (W29, the week of July 13). A dashed forward-projection line and a dashed vertical marker past the last data point mark July 15 as the ship date, with no fabricated data point plotted past W29.
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W27.json:rows[Work Louder x OpenAI Codex Micro] — score 58, note 'a Work Louder-built macro pad teased June 29 — pulls outside-press attention into the enthusiast space ahead of its July 15 launch'
data/trends/2026-W28.json:rows[Work Louder x OpenAI Codex Micro] — score 68, note 'One week out from the planned July 15 launch ... pricing is still unannounced'
data/trends/2026-W29.json:rows[Work Louder x OpenAI Codex Micro] — score 94, note 'ships July 15, 2026; pre-launch teasers drove a discussion spike this week'
